description: FastAPI backend per Wellness Buddy PWA. 1 Uvicorn worker, port 8000.
notes: Bound to 127.0.0.1 (loopback) — Uvicorn never exposed externally; IIS reverse proxy is the only ingress.
Runs as LocalService for least privilege (T-DEPLOY-01 mitigation).
PostgreSQL service name (postgresql-x64-16) may differ on your server — verify with `Get-Service postgresql*`.
